name: cirurgiapro
description: Sistema de Gestão de Procedimentos Cirúrgicos

scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.start: cd backend && npm install && node src/index.js
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && npm install && node src/index.js
scripts.dev:frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
